description: Dashboard discovery, datasource querying, and alert/incident support in Grafana.
name: io.qent.broxy/grafana

environmentVariables.description: URL of the Grafana instance to connect to
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_URL

environmentVariables.description: Service account token with appropriate permissions
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Organization ID for multi-organization Grafana instances
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_ORG_ID

title: Grafana
